data.name: Rock the Rim
data.detailed_description:
Rock the Rim, a cinematic visual novel that fuses the thrill of basketball and the passion of music with choice-driven storytelling. Step into André’s world: challenge rivals on the court, captivate hearts with your compositions, and unravel the mysteries of your past. Every decision shapes your narrative and destiny—what path will you choose?

Features

  • Over 1,400 cinematic static images and 46 cinematic animations

  • 2 hours of immersive gameplay

  • 8 original songs composed exclusively for the game

  • 32 atmospheric sound effects

  • 54 ambient sounds

  • Cinematic storytelling

  • A deep choice system that shapes André’s journey

Story and Choices

As André, 18 years old, you're searching for your path in a world full of talent and pressure. Raised by Logan and Fiona, this house feels like anything but home. Blake’s jealousy keeps pushing you away, while Kayla’s quiet affection lingers in your thoughts. Faded memories—unresolved secrets about your family—follow your every step. Will you rise as a basketball superstar or light up the stage as a rock icon? Your choices will shape your relationships and determine how your story unfolds. Will you chase fame and leave the past behind, or be consumed by the weight of your memories?

Why Play?

Rock the Rim blends the energy of basketball with the passion of music, wrapped in a cinematic mystery. Feel the thrill of André’s slam dunks, stage performances, and a dynamic world full of meaningful connections. With original music and cinematic animations, every moment hits hard. Replay again and again to explore different choices, paths, and relationships — write your story your way.

Episodes

Rock the Rim: Season 1 - Episode 1 launches André’s adventure! This episode delivers a striking beginning. Continue with Episode 2, Episode 3, and beyond—each available as separate DLCs. André’s past and future unfold step by step through these additional stories.

data.short_description: Dive into a choice-driven visual novel blending basketball dreams and musical passion. Shape André’s journey, uncover hidden secrets, build relationships, and chase fame in a gripping mystery of destiny and drama.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 650 or AMD Radeon HD 7770
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: High-quality audio output supported sound card

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Sierra (10.12) or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (e.g., Intel HD Graphics 4000 or Apple M1 integrated GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio hardware
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Ventura (13.0) or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics (e.g., Apple M1 Pro or Intel Iris Xe Graphics)
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: High-quality audio hardware

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 LTS or higher (or compatible SteamOS distribution)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core (e.g., Intel Core 2 Duo or AMD Athlon 64 X2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible (e.g., Intel HD Graphics 3000 or NVIDIA GeForce 8600 GT)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio hardware
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or higher (or compatible SteamOS distribution)
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz Quad-Core (e.g., Intel Core i3 or AMD Ryzen 3)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible (e.g., NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: High-quality audio hardware
